arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudFront function.

code.description: The source code of the CloudFront function.

comment.description: The comment or description provided for the CloudFront function.

etag.description: The ETag identifier for the CloudFront function.

id.description: The unique identifier for the CloudFront function.

key_value_store_associations.description: The set of key-value store associations linked to the CloudFront function.

last_modified_time.description: The timestamp of when the CloudFront function was last modified.

runtime.description: The runtime environment of the CloudFront function.

status.description: The current status of the CloudFront function.
